hooks.command: CHANGES=$(git diff HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CHANGES" ]; then REPO_ID=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null | shasum -a 256 | cut -d' ' -f1 | head -c 12); CURRENT_HASH=$(echo "$CHANGES" | shasum -a 256 | cut -d' ' -f1); LAST_HASH=$(cat "/tmp/.codex-last-reviewed-hash-${REPO_ID}" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$CURRENT_HASH" != "$LAST_HASH" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Code changes detected since last Codex review. Run the codex-review-code skill to review these changes."}'; fi; fi
